title: Adam and Lilliths roles
wikitext:
[]: Adam and Lillith's roles (Spoilers? you know it!)             Quote Post by konfunoodle » Thu Dec 17, 2009 2:15 pm Masks in a plot are to symbolize a theme or a character. As it is a mystery as to what god really looks like, hence forth the mask of god. Unlike the TV series lillith no longer possess "the mask of god" and instead wears a mask simular to those of an angel's. At the end of 1.0 the giant on the moon is wearing the mask of god. I for one believe that this is could change the plot drastically. perhaps Their roles are switched and the truth of their natures are still yet to be revieled. Maybe this could effect Rie and Kaworu's Roles. I'm done ranting for now, but i look forward as to what everyone else thinks. yay

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Dec 17, 2009 2:28 pm I doubt it. For one thing, the Giant on the Moon is an Evangelion, not Adam. Two, there are multiple aesthetic changes being made to the franchise that have had no plot bearings, and it's not like Lilith's mask really meant anything anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Dec 17, 2009 3:14 pm AuraTwilight wrote: I doubt it. For one thing, the Giant on the Moon is an Evangelion, not Adam. Two, there are multiple aesthetic changes being made to the franchise that have had no plot bearings, and it's not like Lilith's mask really meant anything anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by EdZ » Thu Dec 17, 2009 4:53 pm AuraTwilight wrote: For one thing, the Giant on the Moon is an Evangelion

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Dec 17, 2009 4:59 pm EdZ wrote: AuraTwilight wrote: For one thing, the Giant on the Moon is an Evangelion

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Dec 17, 2009 4:59 pm If it's not a clone of Adam what do you think it is? Do you think Mark/Eva-06 may have the same origin of Unit-01? I wonder why it's referred to as "Mark" and not "Eva" in the film though...

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Dec 17, 2009 5:04 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: If it's not a clone of Adam what do you think it is? Do you think Mark/Eva-06 may have the same origin of Unit-01? I wonder why it's referred to as "Mark" and not "Eva" in the film though...

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Dec 17, 2009 5:10 pm They know of Lilith, there is no way something like SEELE would not know of her. Side question..In NGE, 01 is a clone of Lilith straight out of her body but yet she comes out a brown skinned being while Lilith is White skinned..No jokes here..cause I mean we could all make them. They seemed to have fixed this little "error?" in Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Dec 17, 2009 5:29 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: They know of Lilith, there is no way something like SEELE would not know of her. Side question..In NGE, 01 is a clone of Lilith straight out of her body but yet she comes out a brown skinned being while Lilith is White skinned..No jokes here..cause I mean we could all make them. They seemed to have fixed this little "error?" in Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Dec 17, 2009 5:29 pm I like the Evapedia on here but let's be honest- it's made by other fans on this website. As far as the unfinished Rebuild franchise is concerned, like Wikipedia itself, most things on there are pure fan speculation. What is up with Eva Unit 06 and going on behind the scenes to make it so special? No one really knows yet.

[]:             Quote Post by konfunoodle » Thu Dec 17, 2009 8:58 pm i 4got the moon giant being an Eva. my bad. But i still think there is a reason as to why lillith's mask has changed and the other mask is on an Eva. The mask of God seemed symbolic in the EoE where as lillith is the creator of lilin, so lillith was entitled to the mask. also how it was removed when lillith became reunited with her soul, reveling her self. Then again Adam wasnt shown with something similar....now my head hurts. sorry

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Fri Dec 18, 2009 3:52 am Azathoth wrote: For one thing, it took half of Lilith's body just to make one Eva. If they'd made another out of her, it seems like there wouldn't be much left.

[]:             Quote Post by Paintballer » Fri Dec 18, 2009 4:55 am Gonna go out on a limb and say..the lilith like thing on the moon is some how unit 01 from end of evangelion. xD

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Dec 18, 2009 5:17 am Paintballer wrote: Gonna go out on a limb and say..the lilith like thing on the moon is some how unit 01 from end of evangelion. xD

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Fri Dec 18, 2009 6:01 am SaltyJoe wrote: If i'm not mistaken, the "halving" of Lilith's body was caused by the Lance of Longinus.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Dec 18, 2009 7:22 am Ornette wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Fri Dec 18, 2009 8:22 am Jinroh wrote: That's not what I understood. On the contrary I think the lance is here to freeze it, stop it from regenerating.

[]:             Quote Post by EdZ » Fri Dec 18, 2009 11:29 am SaltyJoe wrote: Nobody knows it's origins, but 2.0 clearly showed that the Moon Giant is in fact Unit-06.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Dec 18, 2009 2:14 pm Not really. A = B equals B = A.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Fri Dec 18, 2009 2:52 pm It's not an Evangelion. IT'S A TRAP. But what about the legs coming out of Lilith? There was probably an explanation for it in the show but I honestly don't remember.
